arguments.content:
# Metrics Framework
## North Star, KPI Hierarchy & Indicator System

---

## 1. North Star Metric

### Definition
The **North Star Metric** is the single metric that best captures the core value your product delivers to customers.

### Selection Criteria
| Criterion | Weight | Description |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| Reflects core value | 30% | Directly measures customer success |
| Predicts growth | 25% | Leading indicator of long-term growth |
| Actionable | 25% | Teams can directly influence it |
| Measurable | 20% | Reliable, consistent tracking |

### North Star Examples by Business Model
| Model | North Star | Rationale |
|-------|-----------|-----------|
| SaaS | Weekly Active Teams | Usage = value realization |
| Marketplace | Gross Merchandise Value | Captures both sides of network |
| E-commerce | Monthly Repeat Purchase Rate | Loyalty drives sustainable growth |
| Consumer App | Daily Active Users (DAU) | Engagement = attention = monetization |
| B2B Platform | Monthly Active Licenses | Adoption = expansion revenue |

### Our North Star Metric
**Primary:** Monthly Active Core Actions (MACA)  
**Secondary:** Customer Success Score (CSAT × Retention)  
**Guardrail:** Unit Economics (CAC/LTV ratio)

---

## 2. KPI Hierarchy - The Metrics Pyramid

```
                    ┌─────────────┐
                    │  NORTH STAR │ ← 1 metric (company-wide)
                    └──────┬──────┘
                           │
              ┌────────────┼────────────┐
              │            │            │
         ┌────┴────┐  ┌────┴────┐  ┌────┴────┐
         │  INPUT  │  │ OUTPUT  │  │ OUTCOME │ ← ~10 metrics
         │ METRICS │  │ METRICS │  │ METRICS │
         └────┬────┘  └────┬────┘  └────┬────┘
              │            │            │
    ┌─────────┼────────┐   │   ┌──────┼──────┐
    │    ┌────┴────┐   │   │   │      │      │
    │    │  TEAM   │   │   │   │      │      │
    │    │ METRICS │   │   │   │      │      │
    │    └─────────┘   │   │   │      │      │
    │                  │   │   │      │      │
 ┌──┴───┐  ┌──┴───┐  ┌─┴─┐ │ ┌─┴─┐┌─┴─┐ ┌──┴───┐
 │  IN  │  │ EXPER│  │PROD │ │FIN│ │ENG│ │  CS  │
 │MARKET│  │ IMENT│  │UCT  │ │   │ │   │ │      │
 └──────┘  └──────┘  └────┘ │ └───┘└───┘ └──────┘
                            │
                       ┌────┴────┐
                       │ INDIVIDUAL │ ← Dashboard drivers
                       │  METRICS   │
                       └────────────┘
```

### Level 1: North Star (1 metric)
- Example: Monthly Active Core Actions (MACA)
- Target: +20% QoQ

### Level 2: Strategic Pillars (~10 metrics)

**Input Metrics (What we invest)**
| Metric | Definition | Target |
|--------|------------|--------|
| I1: CAC | Customer Acquisition Cost | <$500 |
| I2: Product Velocity | Features shipped per sprint | >8 |
| I3: Team Satisfaction | eNPS score | >50 |

**Output Metrics (What we produce)**
| Metric | Definition | Target |
|--------|------------|--------|
| O1: New Customers | Monthly new logos | >100 |
| O2: Feature Adoption | % using new features | >40% |
| O3: Support Tickets | Per 1000 users/month | <50 |

**Outcome Metrics (Business results)**
| Metric | Definition | Target |
|--------|------------|--------|
| R1: MRR Growth | Month-over-month | >10% |
| R2: Net Revenue Retention | Including expansions | >110% |
| R3: Payback Period | Months to recover CAC | <12 |

### Level 3: Team Metrics (~5-8 per team)
Each team owns specific metrics tied to their OKRs.

### Level 4: Individual Metrics (Daily drivers)
- Feature-specific engagement
- Support resolution times
- Code commit quality scores

---

## 3. Leading vs Lagging Indicators

### Definition Matrix

| Aspect | Leading Indicators | Lagging Indicators |
|--------|-------------------|-------------------|
| **Timing** | Predict future outcomes | Reflect past performance |
| **Action** | Influence behavior today | Explain results tomorrow |
| **Volatility** | More volatile | Smoother, stable |
| **Utility** | Course correction | Accountability reporting |

### Framework Application

```
CUSTOMER LIFECYCLE:

Acquisition          Activation        Revenue            Retention
────────────         ───────────       ────────           ─────────
     │                    │                │                  │
     ▼                    ▼                ▼                  ▼
[LEADING] ────► [LEADING] ────► [MIXED] ────► [LAGGING]
• Landing page     • Onboarding      • Expansion       • NPS
  conversion         completion        velocity          quarter
• Trial signup     • First value        │               • Churn
• Demo requests      moment          • Invoice        • LTV
• Ad CTR           • Time to value       aging

                      ▲                    │
                      └────────────────────┘
                         [LEADING FEEDBACK]
```

### Leading Indicator Library

| Stage | Metric | Why It Leads |
|-------|--------|--------------|
| Awareness | Share of Voice | Predicts funnel volume |
| Acquisition | Trial-to-paid velocity | Shortens time to revenue |
| Activation | Feature adoption rate | Drives retention |
| Engagement | Weekly active actions | Predicts churn 90 days out |
| Expansion | Support case sentiment | Flags expansion risk |

### Lagging Indicator Library

| Stage | Metric | Why It Lags |
|-------|--------|-------------|
| Financial | Revenue | Recognizes after service rendered |
| Growth | Net Retention | Requires 12-month calculation |
| Satisfaction | Annual NPS | Point-in-time annual measure |
| Market | Market Share | Quarterly industry reports |
| Team | Annual Reviews | 12-month feedback cycles |

### Balanced Scorecard

| Perspective | Leading Indicator | Lagging Indicator | Ratio |
|-------------|-------------------|-------------------|-------|
| **Customer** | Support tickets opened | NPS score | 3:1 |
| **Product** | Feature usage velocity | Release cycle time | 2:1 |
| **Finance** | Pipeline velocity | Revenue growth | 2:1 |
| **Team** | 1:1 frequency | Retention rate | 3:1 |

---

## 4. Metric Ownership & Governance

### RACI Matrix

| Activity | CEO | CFO | CPO | VP Eng | VP CS | Head of Marketing |
|----------|-----|-----|-----|--------|-------|-------------------|
| Define North Star | A | C | C | I | I | I |
| Set KPI targets | A | R | C | C | C | C |
| Track financial metrics | I | A/R | I | I | I | I |
| Track product metrics | A | C | R | C | I | I |
| Track engagement metrics | I | I | A | R | C | I |
| Report to board | A | R | C | I | I | I |

*A = Accountable, R = Responsible, C = Consulted, I = Informed*

### Review Cadence

| Meeting | Frequency | Metrics Reviewed | Attendees |
|---------|-----------|------------------|-----------|
| Executive Metrics Review | Weekly | North Star + KPIs | C-Suite |
| Team Standup | Daily | Tactical metrics | Team |
| All Hands | Monthly | High-level trends | Company |
| Board Deck | Monthly | Financial + strategic | Board |
| Deep Dive | Quarterly | Cohort analysis | Analytics |

### Metric Health Checklist

- [ ] Defined with clear calculation
- [ ] Has data owner assigned
- [ ] Tracked in real-time dashboard
- [ ] Has target with timeline
- [ ] Connected to team incentives
- [ ] Reviewed at defined cadence
- [ ] Documented in data catalog

---

## 5. Anti-Patterns to Avoid

### Vanity Metrics
❌ Total signups (without activation)  
❌ Page views (without conversion)  
❌ App downloads (without DAU)  

### Metric Myopia
❌ Optimizing local metric at global expense  
❌ Changing definitions to hit targets  
❌ Overfitting to short-term fluctuations  

### Data Silos
❌ Each team has inconsistent metrics  
❌ Single source of truth unclear  
❌ Metrics not connected to business outcomes  

---

## Quick Reference: Metrics Cheat Sheet

| When You Need
